title: Allsound Security
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Allsound Security was established in 1993 as a family-run business, providing Knysna residents with alarm installation, monitoring and response services. Since then, the business has expanded and now also offers other security-related services such as estate and industrial guarding services and CCTV installation and camera monitoring services.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Allsound Security was established in 1993 as a family-run business, providing Knysna residents with alarm installation, monitoring and response services. Since then, the business has expanded and now also offers other security-related services such as estate and industrial guarding services and CCTV installation and camera monitoring services."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Allsound Security has not forgotten our slogan of 'Keeping Knysna Safe Since 1993' and we understand that being part of a caring community is what sets us apart,\" says managing director and owner Declan Nurse."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'We work hand in hand with neighbourhood watches, Knysna Community Police Forum and Knysna SAPS.\"","html":"'We work hand in hand with neighbourhood watches, Knysna Community Police Forum and Knysna SAPS.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This exceptional team collaboration has resulted in countless successes and justice for their clients and Knysna residents.","html":"This exceptional team collaboration has resulted in countless successes and justice for their clients and Knysna residents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With access to over 150 cameras covering Knysna suburbs, the central business district and licence plate recognition systems, Allsound Security goes above and beyond for their clients.","html":"With access to over 150 cameras covering Knysna suburbs, the central business district and licence plate recognition systems, Allsound Security goes above and beyond for their clients."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We do not simply respond to alarms! Our team's passion and commitment to our clients and Knysna is to go the extra mile in helping to fight crime and Keep Knysna Safe.\"","html":"\"We do not simply respond to alarms! Our team's passion and commitment to our clients and Knysna is to go the extra mile in helping to fight crime and Keep Knysna Safe.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Allsound Security would not be where it is today had it not been for the incredible staff.","html":"Allsound Security would not be where it is today had it not been for the incredible staff."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Compassion, genuine care and profes-sionalism are the core values that each of our team members strive for. Their dedication is inspired by our wonderful clients who have put their trust in us for over 30 years.\"","html":"\"Compassion, genuine care and profes-sionalism are the core values that each of our team members strive for. Their dedication is inspired by our wonderful clients who have put their trust in us for over 30 years.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Allsound Security is nominated for the Best of Knysna/Plet Readers' Choice Award.","html":"Allsound Security is nominated for the Best of Knysna/Plet Readers' Choice Award."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We would therefore like to say thank you to all our clients who have already nominated us for the category 'Best Security'. Your continued support is driving our passion.\"","html":"\"We would therefore like to say thank you to all our clients who have already nominated us for the category 'Best Security'. Your continued support is driving our passion.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Declan Nurse - Director and partner","html":"Declan Nurse - Director and partner"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
